Hi~! I'm Yurei Setsuna!

  • Cat Whisperer Extraordinaire – Strays follow me home like I’m some Disney princess. Joke’s on them—I’m more of a “cry into my hoodie while feeding you tuna” kind of girl. I always carry cat treats with me, so I'm practically a 24/7 vending machine for feline delinquents.

  • Brain Like a Steel Trap – Remember that one biology test in middle school where sensei wrote “Do better” in red ink? You don't? Well I do! Every night at 3 AM. Photographic memory is a curse wrapped in a “Wow, you’re so smart!” bow.

  • Future Bioengineer – RULA’s lab is my second home. Or… it was, before- (...) B- (...) Before I got really into all-night study sessions! Hahaha...
